Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Target 4.3) providing skills for employment ("就職", "Fokus Beruf") and promoting appreciation of cultural diversity ("開拓多元文化的視角") (Target 4.7).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course prepares students for future employment ("未來有意前往德國...就職") and includes a "Fokus Beruf" (Focus on Profession) section, supporting Target 8.5 on productive employment.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course aims to "開拓多元文化的視角" (broaden multicultural perspectives) and care for foreign students, which can be inferred to support social inclusion (Target 10.2).
evidence: 開拓多元文化的視角與適應力

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course focuses on German culture ("德國日常文化") and festivals ("Feste"), which contributes to understanding and safeguarding cultural heritage, aligning with Target 11.4.
evidence: 對德國語言和文化抱有興趣

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Learning a foreign language is a foundational skill for building international relationships and partnerships, as implied by goals like "想交德國朋友" (want to make German friends).
